title: Second US Fighter Jet Downed Near Strait of Hormuz
summary: A second US fighter jet has been downed near the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions. Search efforts for the F-15E crew member continue in Iranian territory.
charlotte_impact: Heightened military activity and potential for direct conflict between the US and Iran pose a significant global security risk.

title: Pam Bondi's Last-Ditch Effort to Keep Job Exposed

title: Trump Threatens Iran Over Strait of Hormuz Closure
summary: Trump threatens Iran with "hell" if the Strait of Hormuz is not reopened within 48 hours, further escalating tensions in the region.
charlotte_impact: Aggressive rhetoric increases the risk of miscalculation and military confrontation between the US and Iran.

title: US Agents Arrest Soleimani's Relatives After Revoking Green Cards
summary: US agents arrested relatives of Qassem Soleimani after their green cards were revoked, signaling a continued hardline stance against Iranian figures.
